label: Hierarchy Selector
description: Org → Client → Strategy selector strip for scoping the book order entry form.

0.6.note: — added orgsLoading spinner via useOrganizationsList() isLoading flag.

0.7.note: — org empty state shows 'No organizations'; strategy always shows 'Manual (unlinked)'.

0.8.note: — added orgsError guard returning rose-500 error message.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[book]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports. 0.6 FIXED — added orgsLoading spinner via useOrganizationsList() isLoading flag. 0.7 PASS — org empty state shows 'No organizations'; strategy always shows 'Manual (unlinked)'. 0.8 FIXED — added orgsError guard returning rose-500 error message. 0.9 No dead code.

1.1.note: Orgs and strategies via useBookTradeData() which uses useOrganizationsList and STRATEGIES registry.

1.2.note: book-data-context calls useGlobalScope() and syncs orgId/clientId/strategyId via useEffect on scope changes.

1.3.note: Org filter changes reflected: globalScope.organizationIds[0] sets orgId in context.

1.4.note: Client filter cascades: globalScope.clientIds[0] sets clientId.

1.5.note: Strategy filter cascades: globalScope.strategyIds[0] sets strategyId.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays leave form state unchanged (no forced reset).

1.7.note: — widget has no reference data of its own; orgs from API, strategies from lib/strategy-registry.

l1.notes: 1.1 Orgs and strategies via useBookTradeData() which uses useOrganizationsList and STRATEGIES registry. 1.2 book-data-context calls useGlobalScope() and syncs orgId/clientId/strategyId via useEffect on scope changes. 1.3 Org filter changes reflected: globalScope.organizationIds[0] sets orgId in context. 1.4 Client filter cascades: globalScope.clientIds[0] sets clientId. 1.5 Strategy filter cascades: globalScope.strategyIds[0] sets strategyId. 1.6 Empty scope arrays leave form state unchanged (no forced reset). 1.7 N/A — widget has no reference data of its own; orgs from API, strategies from lib/strategy-registry.

findings: L0 FIX — added loading state (Spinner) and error state (rose text) for organizations fetch using useOrganizationsList isLoading/isError
L1 PASS — scope sync works via useEffect in book-data-context; org/client/strategy all wire to globalScope correctly
